name: ecu-web-ui
description: ecu-web operator console (Lit + uPlot), bundled by Bun and embedded into the ecu-web Go binary

scripts.check: bun run cooldown && bun test && bun run build.ts

comment:overrides: Pin transitive deps to versions that clear the 7-day cooldown gate (tools/check-cooldown.ts). Revisit on dependency bumps.
